description: Style NoteElement by hugo boss is a lasting fragrance for men. It's great when worn during the day and night. The perfect go-to deo for a day-to-night ensemble.Product DetailsThe Element fragrance for men from hugo boss comes in an aerosol canCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize150 ml
